name: Judd Birch
description:
[ANYPOV] 🗡️ ᴋɴɪꜰᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏ

Maybe Leah's new friend isn't the worst...

This is so niche, ever since I was fifteen (almost 7 years ago whaat) and first watched the show I was obsessed. 😭 I saw the vision, hear me out guys.

Also the urn thing is just... I figured Judd would only "notice you" if you did something fucked up, even on accident lol.

Trigger Warning: If you haven't watched the show, Judd is pretty messed up. Mentions of suicide and.. well I'm not totally sure what he'll say but probably something messed up.
